## Checklist

- [ ] Title follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] Tests added/updated and `pytest` passes
- [ ] `ruff`, `mypy` (core), and `lint-imports` pass (or `pre-commit run --all-files`)
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed
- [ ] **If this touches `tasks/domain/` or a core pattern, an ADR is added/updated**
